messages.help:
I can solve any math problem step by step!

Try:
  • "2 + 2" or "3 * 7"
  • "sin(45)^2 + cos(45)^2"
  • "derivative of x^3 + 2x^2"
  • "integrate 2x + 1"
  • "solve x^2 - 5x + 6 = 0"
  • "simplify (x+1)(x-1)"
  • "factor x^2 - 4"
  • "solve x^3 + 3x = 12"
  • Any math expression!
messages.connection_error: Connection error. Please check your internet and try again.
